code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut in_token = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        in_token = false
      else
        if not in_token
          count = count + 1
          in_token = true
        end
      end
    when None
      in_token = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut state = 0
  mut k = 0
  while k < count
    state = match state
    when 0
      1
    when 1
      2
    when _
      0
    end
    k = k + 1
  end

  let name = match state
  when 0
    "Red"
  when 1
    "Green"
  when _
    "Yellow"
  end
  println(name)
end
